title: #group-by - dropdown columns

posts.author: mclochet (MARIE-CLAIRE LOCHET)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Just starting to use the group-by feature and here are my team’s first impressions:

  • Enhancing the group-by feature to include dropdown type column grouping, so far this column type is excluded, if I am not mistaken!
  • Additionally, enabling a type-ahead functionality within the group-by dropdown menu would streamline the process, especially for boards with a large number of columns. This would not only improve navigation but also make the selection process much more efficient.

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree! I’m surprised you can group by a text field, but not by a ‘Dropdown’ field.

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our application, sumUp for monday

In particular, the section of the Group by widget. This widget can group key metrics and even calculate sums in an extra row at the bottom.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho

posts.author: Casey_M (Casey)
posts.cookedHtml: +1. I think you can now group by dropdown as long as you only have one selection in the column for each item (which sort of defeats the dropdown type effect). I’m coming from Airtable and this is one of the biggest bummers for me because I have quite a few columns with multi-select options needed.
